title: ziziphus oxyphylla
intro: Ziziphus oxyphylla, also known as the Five-angled Jujube or Chinese Thorny Jujube, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and India, characterized by its thorny branches and small, greenish-yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
